objective: Verify and maintain local MPL-2.0 public-core readiness for Graph Hub without external publication or git side effects.
surface_summary: Graph Hub working tree, MPL license and notice, public release checker, MCP surface, public style registry, docs, templates, and tests.

assumptions.claim: The local working tree is being prepared as an MPL-2.0 public core.
assumptions.verification_step: Inspect LICENSE, NOTICE, README.md, pyproject.toml, and run the public release checker.

assumptions.claim: The release checker remains conservative and should pass only after real cleanup, not by suppressing checks.
assumptions.verification_step: Inspect scripts/check_public_release.py diff and run its tests.

assumptions.claim: The MCP surface is part of the public core and must remain operational.
assumptions.verification_step: Run MCP smoke, focused MCP tests, and tool-reference freshness checks.

assumptions.claim: Publication remains a separate human gate.
assumptions.verification_step: Confirm no workflow step performs push, PR, tag, release, registry upload, package publication, or visibility change.

safe_now: Edit local source, tests, docs, metadata, and planning artifacts needed for public-core readiness.
Remove or generalize project-specific public surfaces.
Record remaining risks without publishing externally.
human_gated: Create a public mirror or change repository visibility.
Publish to PyPI, Docker, MCP Registry, GitHub Releases, or social channels.
Push, create a PR, commit, tag, or release.
Open a stable third-party plugin API or external code-loading contract.
Rewrite git history or run secret-history cleanup.

verification.falsifier: uv run python scripts/check_public_release.py exits nonzero or reports a blocker.

verification.claim_or_output: MCP smoke passes with eight public style formats.
verification.falsifier: uv run python graphhub_mcp_server.py --smoke exits nonzero or reports a non-ok status.
uv run python scripts/gen_tool_reference.py --check exits nonzero.
Focused or full pytest commands fail.
A commit, push, PR, tag, release, registry upload, or visibility change was performed.
verification.evidence_required: git status/diff inspection and no remote commands

risk_gates.trigger: Public mirror, visibility change, public branch, package, release, or registry publication
Commit, push, PR, tag, release, rebase, reset, force-push, branch rewrite, or history cleanup
Exporting or publishing project-specific datasets, unpublished workflow notes, credentials, manuscript assets, or internal style packs
Stable third-party plugin API, external code auto-loading, or plugin compatibility guarantee
risk_gates.safe_default: Use project config and explicit scripts only

invalidation_rules: Rerun release checker after docs, examples, themes, provenance, license, notice, metadata, release checker, or marker-disposition changes.
Rerun MCP smoke and focused tests after any MCP, schema, docs/tools, or render path change.
Rerun focused style/config tests after target format, style profile, preset, or theme changes.

expected_output: Local working tree ready for user review, with verification evidence and no external side effects.
